dailyOutput.heading: EP Production Output Record
dailyOutput.subtitle: Record completed quantities per EP process. Totals roll up to process, module (min of processes), SJ No (min of modules), and schedule.
dailyOutput.noSearchResults: No output records match your search.
dailyOutput.workerReadOnlyList: Worker accounts can only view this list. Adding or changing records is not available here.
dailyOutput.workerReadOnlyDetail: View only. Workers cannot edit or delete this record.
dailyOutput.workerQrReadOnly: Showing filtered records for this process. Quantity entry is not available on this screen for worker accounts.
dailyOutput.sjOrderSearchLabel: SJ Order (search by SJ PO#, SJ No, style…)
dailyOutput.noScheduleForOrder: No EP schedule is linked to this SJ Order yet. Create one under EP Real-time Production first.
dailyOutput.pickEpScheduleHint: The same PO can exist on multiple orders — pick the line that matches production line / dates.
dailyOutput.modalCurrentCumulative: Current cumulative output for this process
dailyOutput.modalCumulativeHint: The new quantity adds to cumulative output. Cumulative cannot exceed process total.
dailyOutput.qtyCapHint: You can enter at most {{max}}. Daily entries are capped so cumulative output never exceeds process total.
dailyOutput.qtyCapHintEdit: You can enter at most {{max}} so cumulative output does not exceed process total.
dailyOutput.qtyRemainingZero: No remaining capacity — cumulative output already equals total. You cannot add more here.
dailyOutput.qtyRemainingZeroEdit: No remaining capacity — set a higher process total or reduce other daily entries.
dailyOutput.noProcessTotal: Process total qty is not set on EP, so no automatic limit is applied.
dailyOutput.recordedAtWorkerLocked: The recorded time is set automatically when you save (worker accounts cannot change this).
dailyOutput.deleteConfirm: Delete this output record? Roll-up totals will be recalculated.
dailyOutput.fromQrScan: Opened from process QR — enter quantity and save.
dailyOutput.qrOpenError: Could not open output form for this process. Check the link or try again.

list.moduleCategoryEmpty: No module categories are defined. Add categories in settings first.
list.defectQtyCumulativeTooltip: Cumulative defect qty from EP inspection records. Click to open the filtered inspection list.

moduleCategorySettings.intro: Manage top-level categories (Cutting, Preparation, …) and sub-categories. Names can be entered in English, Korean, and Vietnamese; the app shows the label for the active UI language.
moduleCategorySettings.noChildren: No sub-categories — modules can link directly to this top-level category.
moduleCategorySettings.toastSlugRequired: Top-level categories need a unique slug (e.g. cutting).

list.scheduleDailyOutputByDayGroup: Schedule daily output (qty) — sum shown on the first SJ row of each schedule
list.calendarScrollHint: The calendar spans the previous month, the selected month, and the next month. Scroll the table horizontally to see day cells in adjacent months.
list.calendarPlanDetailTooltip: Planned per 8h day (excl. Sun & registered holidays): {{daily}} = {{total}} ÷ {{workDays}} workday(s)
list.planHolidaysButtonHint: Register dates to exclude from planned daily output (Sundays are always excluded).
list.planHolidaysModalLead: Each registered date is excluded from planned daily output like a Sunday. Start only = one day; start and end = every calendar day in the inclusive range with the same label.
list.planHolidayRangeHint: Leave end empty for a single day. Start/end order does not matter. Up to {{max}} days per save.
list.planHolidayRangeTooLong: You can register at most {{max}} days at once.
list.calendarDragHints: Drag left/right edge: adjust start/end · Drag center: move range · Click center: detail (popup)
list.sjOrderMultiHint: Search and add multiple SJ Orders. Each will be copied as a VL Assembly SJ No on one schedule.
list.sjOrderAlreadySelected: This SJ Order is already selected
list.styleMismatchError: SJ Style code mismatch. Only SJ Orders with the same SJ Style code ({{expected}}) can be grouped in one schedule. Selected order style code: {{got}}
list.sjNoSplit: SJ No split to new schedule
list.productionLineHint: First choose the factory, then the line under that factory. Leave both empty if not needed.
list.exFactoryHint: EX-Factory for the selected SJ Order. Leave empty to kevl assembly the order’s current date; set a date to save it on the order.
list.sjOrderRequired: Select at least one SJ Order
list.moduleCategoryHint: Pick any category level (top-level or sub-category). Only modules in the selected categories—and their descendant categories on the server—are copied into VL Assembly.
list.moduleCategoryRequired: Select at least one module category
list.moduleCategoryEmpty: No module categories are defined. Add categories in settings first.
list.defectQtyCumulativeTooltip: Cumulative defect qty from VL Assembly inspection records. Click to open the filtered inspection list.

dDay.label: ‼ D-Day
dDay.desc: Deadline is today — must finish all remaining today

warn.label: ⚠ Warn
warn.desc: Required is 1×~1.5× the daily target — speed up

danger.label: ⚠⚠ Danger
danger.desc: Required exceeds 1.5× daily target — at risk of missing deadline

overdue.label: ‼ OVERDUE
overdue.desc: Deadline already passed — immediate action needed

noTarget.label: ○ No target
noTarget.desc: Deadline set but no daily target (set IE Metrics)

legend.title: EF Buffer — Production Completion Projection
legend.formula: Formula: Projected completion = Today + ⌈Balance ÷ daily pace⌉ work days. Buffer = work days to EX-Factory.
legend.paceNote: * Actual pace (output ÷ elapsed days) is used when available; otherwise daily target is used.

safe.label: ● On track (+Nd)
safe.desc: Projected to finish ≥ 4 days before EX-Factory

tight.label: ⚠ Tight (+Nd)
tight.desc: Will finish before EX-Factory, but close (≤ 3 days buffer or after assembly finish)

danger.label: ⚠⚠ At risk (-Nd)
danger.desc: Projected to miss EX-Factory at current pace

noData.label: — No data
noData.desc: Insufficient data: no deadline, no output, or no daily target

legend.title: SPI — Schedule Performance Index
legend.formula:
SPI = Actual output ÷ Expected output by today
(Expected = Total qty × elapsed work days ÷ total planned work days)
legend.moduleNote: For module/process rows, SPI is calculated against the process schedule dates.

scheduleDetail.assemblyOutputExceedsTotal: Assembly output qty cannot exceed total order qty ({{cap}}).
scheduleDetail.assemblyOutputMaxHint: Enter at most the total qty (max {{cap}}).
scheduleDetail.deleteSjNoConfirm: will be removed from this schedule. Continue?

sjNoDetail.notFound: VL Assembly SJ No not found.
sjNoDetail.throughputRollupHint: If the API returns SJ No–level values, they are shown; otherwise values are derived from the slowest process across all modules (bottleneck).

sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.heading: {{sjNo}} · Assembly daily output (schedule #{{schedulePk}})
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.subtitle: Per-schedule assembly output entries for the VL Assembly schedule this SJ No belongs to. If the schedule has multiple SJ Nos, all rows for that schedule appear here. Use the button below for QR / quantity entry on the full form.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.noSchedule: No linked VL Assembly schedule; cannot load the list.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.analyticsSectionHint: Matches the date range you select above. Up to 500 rows in time order. Bar: qty per entry. Line: schedule cumulative at save time.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.analyticsEmpty: No data in this range. Try widening the dates.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.planActualTablesHint: Actual totals match the chart (per schedule). Planned qty spreads this SJ No total ({{totalQty}}) evenly across assembly workdays (excl. Sun & plan holidays). Per-hour plan is daily plan ÷ 8 hours (rounded).
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.planTablesEmpty: No output to aggregate. Pick dates or widen the range.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.dayTableNoRange: No date range to show. If there is no output span, set start/end dates.
sjNoScheduleProductionDailyOutput.hourTableHint: Only hours with recorded output (local time) are listed.

moduleDetail.name: Name
moduleDetail.throughputRollupHint: If the API returns module-level values, they are shown; otherwise values are derived from the slowest process (bottleneck) in this module.

processDetail.dailyOutputQrHint: Scan to open VL Assembly Process Output Record with this process pre-selected. Enter quantity and save.
processDetail.standardWorkVideoQrHint: Scan to open this video URL on a phone or tablet.
processDetail.qcScanBanner: Opened from QC label QR — use this screen for inspection / sign-off context.
processDetail.throughputLinkedHint: Cycle time (s/pc) and target per hour stay in sync using 3600 s/h. Editing one updates the others when you save.
processDetail.invalidCycleTime: Enter cycle time as a positive number (seconds per unit).
processDetail.invalidTargetPerHour: Enter target per hour as a positive number.
